title: Suki Baby Small Zooma Soft Boa Plush Rattle with Embroidered Accents (Zebra) (10040), grey & white
features: Suki Baby Zooma small Zebra Rattle
Soft boa plush Rattle with embroidered accents
Zebra print in soft grey and white
description: Product Description Beautiful supersoft plush Zooma Zebra small Babys Rattle from Suki Gifts Baby collection. Premium quality animal style print soft boa plush Zebra in two colour soft grey and white, with embroidered accents to the face. Rattle within head. Approximately 5 ½ inches (14 cm) tall. Suitable for Newborns+. Other items also available in the Bing Bing Giraffe and Zooma Zebra range. Hand wash and air dry. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Zooma Zebra soft boa plush small Zebra Rattle See more
